human_task_name: SynAIpse CC1: recovery QA disproof of recommendation effects
objective: Run a fresh independent QA disproof of immutable CC1 target 8e7e7251 after the prior QA correctly stopped on an expired probe; write the declared evidence within this packet's freshness window.

decision_frame.value: Recover independent QA evidence without overwriting the valid failed-freshness QA record or changing the tested source target.
decision_frame.why_now: The first QA supplied valid blocked_validation evidence only because its five-minute probe expired before testing; no compatibility claim has yet been independently tested.
acceptance_criteria: The QA result is fresh, packet-bound, and refers to immutable target SHA 8e7e7251c299d8f7844cf633cf885bedeab2752d.
QA runs every declared command and attempts to disprove both CC1 projection invariants and the existing fitness-report producer path.
The prior blocked QA artifacts remain unmodified while the recovery result is written under qa2 paths.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Keep freshness enforcement fail-closed while guaranteeing a replacement QA can supply independent proof without reusing stale evidence.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One new QA artifact/result pair in separate qa2 paths.

non_goals: Do not edit production source, tests, the commit, branch, worktree, or any prior Worker or QA artifact.
Do not execute recommended commands with side effects, create routes, add persistence, or change state/context schemas.
Do not push, merge, rebase, reset, stash, clean, delete, or mutate hosted state.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/commands/next-fitness-report.test.ts src/commands/next-agent-parity.test.ts src/commands/next-decision-meta.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Read the immutable CC1 target and run only the declared local disproof commands.
Write only the declared recovery QA artifact and result, or report a packet-bound blocker.

stop_conditions: artifact probe expiry before result write
